lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to lay out and validate the mining fit (tools, refinery, limpets, ore racks).

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Imperial Clipper ship page — manufacturer specs, speed figures, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hardpoint sizes, optional & core internal slot layout, and engineering blueprint data behind the loadout tables.

sources.label: Inara — Imperial Clipper
sources.what: Ship reference: cargo capacity, slot layout and shipyard pricing cross-checked for the mining build.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Imperial Clipper article: Gutamaya manufacture, rank requirement and role profile referenced for this dossier.
